test.query: SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(10)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM test.hits GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 17
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(100)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM test.hits GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 18
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(1000)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM test.hits GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 17
